resultRows.item: Cannabis DNA Health Report model/source output
resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The local fixture supplies conservative evidence-boundary rows and a public sample-output structure. It does not supply a validated personal cannabis-response model, product exposure, dose, route, or clinical/professional context needed for personal conclusions.
genes: Cannabis DNA Health Report model/source output
resultRows.sourceLabel: CDC Cannabis Health Effects; HHS Surgeon General Advisory on Marijuana Use and the Developing Brain; FDA Table of Pharmacogenetic Associations
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: This row explains the local evidence boundary. It cannot recommend cannabis, CBD, THC, dose, route, products, or safety decisions.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The public sample PDF contributes 10 source-bound sample rows covering report identity, warning tables, metabolism, category recommendations, report-wide terpene and THC:CBD fields, activity/product sections, and dosage-calculator structure.
genes: Personal Cannabis Health Report public sample
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: These are sample-output examples only. They are not local-user cannabis findings or personal cannabis guidance.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The public sample PDF is labeled Your Personal Cannabis Health Report, prepared for Sample Report, version 2.0, with a table of contents for Introduction to DNA, Introduction to Cannabis, How To Read This Report, Activity Groups, Your Health Insights, Personalized Recommendations, Dosage Calculator, and Thank you.
resultRows.description: Use the public report identity and section list only as output structure; do not treat sample text as local cannabis guidance.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Observed report identity and section list only; this is not local-user cannabis model output.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample describes four major cannabis-related sections: Warnings, category-specific cannabinoid and terpene recommendations, report-wide cannabinoid and terpene recommendations, and report-wide activity group and product recommendations.
resultRows.description: The sample says warnings include metabolism, smoking, cannabis-induced psychosis, and cannabis dependence; recommendations aggregate traits into category and report-wide outputs.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Observed from How To Read This Report pages; structure only, not local-user recommendations.

resultRows.item: Edible, smoking, psychosis, and dependence warning tables
resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Visible warning tables show CBD metabolism slow as Normal for CYPC219/CYP2C19, THC metabolism as Normal for CYP2C9, lung cancer smoking warning as Increased for CHRNA3/HYKK, cannabis-induced psychosis as Slight for DRDR2/AKT1/ZNF804A, and cannabis dependence as Increased for CNR1/DRD2/FAAH.
resultRows.description: The sample includes caution text for smokable products, high-THC products, and tolerance breaks; SomaReports preserves this as sample-output structure only.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Observed warning-table sample rows; do not copy as local-user smoking, psychosis, dependence, edible, product, or dosage advice.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Visible metabolism table shows CBD Metabolism (Slow) CYP2C19/CYPC219 Normal, CBD Metabolism (Ultra-fast) CYP2C19 Slight, THC Metabolism CYP2C9 Normal, and Reduced Folate Metabolism MTHFR Slight.
resultRows.description: The surrounding page discusses cytochrome P450 metabolism and MTHFR/folate context; the local package does not infer metabolism or supplement guidance without validated local evidence.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Observed sample metabolism rows only; this is not local CYP or MTHFR interpretation.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The Sleep category recommends cannabinoids CBD and terpenes Beta-Caryophyllene, Limonene, and Myrcene; visible trait rows include Poor Sleep Quality CACNA1C Slight, Delayed Sleep CLOCK/PER3 Slight, Restless Leg Syndrome MEIS1 Slight, Narcolepsy CPT1B-CHKB Normal, and Excessive Sleep Movement BTBD9 Slight.
resultRows.description: This preserves category row shape and recommendation fields; local output must not turn the sample into sleep-aid, dosing, product, or treatment guidance.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Observed Sleep sample rows only; they are not local sleep or cannabis recommendations.

resultRows.item: Cannabis and other substance dependence rows
resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The Cannabis Dependence page recommends CBD and says terpene data are insufficient; visible rows include Cannabis Dependence ABCB1/CNR1/Intergenic RP11-215A21.1 Slight, Opioid Dependence OPRM1 Normal, Nicotine Dependence CHRNA3/CHRNB1 Slight, and Alcohol Dependence CHRNA3 Normal.
resultRows.description: Use only as sample output structure; do not infer local addiction, substance-use risk, CBD use, tolerance breaks, or treatment action.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Observed substance-dependence sample rows only; not local behavioral-health or substance-use advice.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: Visible Mood / Personality pages show Group I recommending THC and CBD with Limonene, Beta-Caryophyllene, and Nerolidol, and rows for Anger/Aggression DBH/FYN/HTR2A Slight, Neuroticism PDE4D/PTRD Increased, Stress Susceptibility COMT Slight, Anxiety LOC105376674/SLC6A4 Slight, and PTSD CNR1/FAAH/FKBP5 Increased. Group II recommends CBD, THC, and CBC with Limonene, Beta-Caryophyllene, and Linalool, and rows for Lower Empathy OXTR Slight, Introversion HTR2A/RGS2 Slight, and Depression COMT/HTR2A/TPH2 Slight.
resultRows.description: Observed sample structure only; local output must not infer mood state, psychiatric risk, substance suitability, product use, or treatment.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Observed mood/personality sample rows only; not local mental-health, cannabis, product, or treatment guidance.

resultRows.item: Terpenes, THC:CBD ratio, and activity groups
resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample report-wide section lists Top Primary Terpenes Beta-Caryophyllene and Limonene, Top Secondary Terpenes Alpha-Bisabolol and Alpha-Pinene, a recommended THC:CBD ratio of 2:5, and says the sample could benefit most from Medicate products followed by Chill products.
resultRows.description: SomaReports stores these as observed sample fields only; the local package does not recommend THC, CBD, terpenes, products, or activity groups.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Observed report-wide sample fields only; not local ratio, terpene, product, or activity recommendation.

resultRows.item: Activity group and product section pages
resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample contains section pages for Energize Strains, Energize Products, Create Strains, Create Products, Elevate Strains, Elevate Products, Medicate Strains, Medicate Products, Chill Strains, Chill Products, Sleep Strains, and Sleep Products.
resultRows.description: The visible extracted text exposes section titles rather than product details in the text layer; product names and recommendations remain unavailable unless visible evidence is separately extracted.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Observed product-section headings only; no product rows are invented.

resultRows.item: CBD and THC dosage calculator links
resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample closes with a Dosage Calculator page that asks for gender, body weight, frequency of use, and preferred consumption medium, and links to Strain Genie CBD and THC dosage calculators.
resultRows.description: This page is preserved as sample output structure only; the local package does not calculate dose or recommend using cannabis.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Observed dosage-calculator page only; not local dosage, CBD, THC, route, product, or use guidance.

substanceContext.plainEnglishMeaning: Cannabis DNA Health Report is represented as a sample-backed evidence-boundary package. It can preserve observed report structure and summarize supplied local evidence, while marking unsupported personal cannabis conclusions unavailable.
unsupportedClaims: mental-health, pregnancy, medication, legal, or occupational advice
substanceContext.professionalReview: Use qualified professional review for medical, behavioral-health, medication, pregnancy, workplace, legal, or safety decisions; this synthetic local result is not enough for those decisions.

genotypeSummary.effect: The public sample warning table shows a slight increased-risk lung-cancer smoking warning.
genotypeSummary.phenotype: Observed sample content only; do not infer local smoking, cancer, product, or use guidance.

genotypeSummary.phenotype: Observed sample content only; do not infer local psychiatric risk, THC safety, product, dose, or use guidance.

genotypeSummary.phenotype: Observed sample content only; do not infer local dependence risk, tolerance-break need, treatment, or substance-use guidance.

genotypeSummary.genotype: Top primary terpenes Beta-Caryophyllene and Limonene; top secondary terpenes Alpha-Bisabolol and Alpha-Pinene; THC:CBD ratio 2:5

Use public Cannabis sample rows only as observed output structure; report validated cannabis response model, source algorithm, product exposure, dose, route, frequency, pregnancy context, age context, psychiatric history, medication list, clinician review, and local-user cannabis conclusions unavailable.
uncertainty: No calibrated personal cannabis-response model with provenance and professional review is supplied for this local package.
Public sample rows are used for output-format parity only and should not be treated as personal cannabis advice.
limitations: This validation result uses selected derived evidence only; raw genome data, VCF, FASTQ, BAM, CRAM, and complete callset files are not included.

The package does not recreate proprietary Strain Genie algorithms or infer local product, strain, dose, route, safety, impairment, psychiatric, pregnancy, medication-interaction, legal, therapeutic, diagnosis, treatment, or actionability guidance.
Sample warning tables, THC:CBD ratio, terpene rows, product sections, and dosage-calculator text are observed sample structure, not local-user findings.
